<span class="index-card-label">Graphics Backend</span>

WebGPU backend for browser and native — WGSL shaders, modern GPU API, runs on desktop and web.

## Features

- WebGPU API
- WGSL Shaders
- Browser Support
- Native via Dawn/wgpu
